parameters.query:
WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    '{{ ($json.body.action || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS action,
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.requisition?.id ?? '' }}', '')::INTEGER AS id,
    '{{ ($json.body.requisition?.department || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS department,
    '{{ ($json.body.requisition?.positionTitle || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS position_title,
    {{ Number($json.body.requisition?.headcount ?? 0) }}::INTEGER AS headcount,
    '{{ ($json.body.requisition?.status || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS status,
    {{ Number($json.body.requisition?.urgency ?? 3) }}::INTEGER AS urgency,
    NULLIF('{{ ($json.body.requisition?.notes || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', '')::TEXT AS notes,
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.requisition?.openDate ?? '' }}', '')::DATE AS open_date,
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.requisition?.targetDate ?? '' }}', '')::DATE AS target_date,
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.onboardId ?? "" }}', '')::INTEGER AS onboard_id,
    '{{ ($json.body.onboardStatus || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS 
    NULLIF('{{ $json.body.candidateId ?? "" }}', '')::INTEGER AS candidate_id,
    '{{ ($json.body.candidateStatus || "").replace(/\'/g, "''") }}'::TEXT AS candidate_status
    onboard_status
),
existing AS (
  SELECT j.id
  FROM job_requisitions j
  JOIN input ON input.department = j.department
            AND input.position_title = j.position_title
),
created AS (
  INSERT INTO job_requisitions (
    position_title,
    department,
    headcount,
    filled_count,
    open_date,
    target_date,
    status,
    urgency,
    notes
  )
  SELECT
    input.position_title,
    input.department,
    input.headcount,
    0,
    input.open_date,
    input.target_date,
    input.status,
    input.urgency,
    input.notes
  FROM input
  WHERE input.action = 'create'
    AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM existing)
  RETURNING id, position_title, department, headcount, status, urgency, notes, open_date, target_date
),
updated AS (
  UPDATE job_requisitions j
  SET position_title = input.position_title,
      department = input.department,
      headcount = input.headcount,
      open_date = input.open_date,
      target_date = input.target_date,
      status = input.status,
      urgency = input.urgency,
      notes = input.notes
  FROM input
  WHERE (input.action = 'update' AND j.id = input.id)
     OR (input.action = 'create' AND j.department = input.department AND j.position_title = input.position_title)
  RETURNING j.id, j.position_title, j.department, j.headcount, j.status, j.urgency, j.notes, j.open_date, j.target_date
),
onboard_updated AS (
  UPDATE onboardings
  SET status = CASE WHEN input.action = 'update_onboard' THEN input.onboard_status ELSE status END,
      expected_date = CASE WHEN input.action = 'update_onboard_date' AND input.onboard_id IS NOT NULL THEN NULLIF(input.onboard_status, '')::DATE ELSE expected_date END
  FROM input
  WHERE onboardings.id = input.onboard_id
    AND (
      (input.action = 'update_onboard' AND input.onboard_status IN ('onboarded','no_show','pending','cancelled'))
      OR (input.action = 'update_onboard_date' AND input.onboard_id IS NOT NULL)
    )
  RETURNING onboardings.id, onboardings.name, onboardings.status, TO_CHAR(onboardings.expected_date,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS expected_date
)
candidate_updated AS (
  UPDATE candidates
  SET status = input.candidate_status,
      updated_at = NOW()
  FROM input
  WHERE candidates.id = input.candidate_id
    AND input.action = 'update_candidate_status'
    AND input.candidate_status IN ('withdrawn', 'rejected')
  RETURNING candidates.id, candidates.name, candidates.status
)
SELECT json_build_object(
  'ok', true,
  'action', input.action,
  'candidate', CASE WHEN input.action = 'update_candidate_status' THEN (SELECT json_build_object('id', cu.id, 'name', cu.name, 'status', cu.status) FROM candidate_updated cu LIMIT 1) ELSE NULL END,
  'onboard', CASE WHEN input.action = 'update_onboard' THEN (SELECT json_build_object('id', ou.id, 'name', ou.name, 'status', ou.status) FROM onboard_updated ou LIMIT 1) ELSE NULL END,
  'requisition', json_build_object(
    'id', COALESCE(created.id, updated.id, input.id),
    'positionTitle', COALESCE(created.position_title, updated.position_title, input.position_title),
    'department', COALESCE(created.department, updated.department, input.department),
    'headcount', COALESCE(created.headcount, updated.headcount, input.headcount),
    'status', COALESCE(created.status, updated.status, input.status),
    'urgency', COALESCE(created.urgency, updated.urgency, input.urgency),
    'notes', COALESCE(created.notes, updated.notes, input.notes, ''),
    'openDate', TO_CHAR(COALESCE(created.open_date, updated.open_date, input.open_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    'targetDate', TO_CHAR(COALESCE(created.target_date, updated.target_date, input.target_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  )
) AS data
FROM input
LEFT JOIN created ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN updated ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN onboard_updated ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN candidate_updated ON TRUE;

parameters.jsCode:
const raw = $input.item.json;
return { json_response: JSON.stringify(raw.data || { ok: false, error: 'No response data' }) };

  SELECT

  'ok', true,

  'requisition', json_build_object(
    'id', COALESCE(created.id, updated.id, input.id),
    'positionTitle', COALESCE(created.position_title, updated.position_title, input.position_title),
    'department', COALESCE(created.department, updated.department, input.department),
    'headcount', COALESCE(created.headcount, updated.headcount, input.headcount),

    'openDate', TO_CHAR(COALESCE(created.open_date, updated.open_date, input.open_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
    'targetDate', TO_CHAR(COALESCE(created.target_date, updated.target_date, input.target_date), 'YYYY-MM-DD')
  )

FROM input
LEFT JOIN created ON TRUE
LEFT JOIN updated ON TRUE;
